body.title: Granny: route by role not worker; add escalation status
body.result: DickSimnel escalation→status=escalated; Granny routes escalated→CC only; dispatched_cycle.json removed; set-worker '' clears worker
body.description:
Granny currently routes by worker field (igor/claude/dicksimnel). This is wrong — routing should be by role (apprentice < builder < creator < master < guru). Worker is only an assignment record set at dispatch time, not a routing key.

Role hierarchy: apprentice < builder < creator < master < guru.
- DickSimnel = builder
- CC = master (can handle creator and below)
- Akien = guru

When a builder fails → ticket becomes status=escalated, role bumps to creator, worker cleared. Master picks up creator-and-below escalations on next availability.

Granny holds no dispatch state — all state lives in the ticket. dispatched_cycle.json, stale watchdog, per-worker circuit logic are all debt from the old worker-routing model.

**Changes:**
1. cc_queue.py set-worker: accept null/blank to clear worker
2. Granny run_once(): query by role ≤ available tier instead of worker=name
3. Add status=escalated to valid status list in cc_queue.py
4. DickSimnel escalation path: sets status=escalated, bumps role, clears worker
5. Remove dispatched_cycle.json tracking from Granny (ticket status IS the state)

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py, devices/granny/daemon.py, devices/dicksimnel/shim.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; state in ticket not in Granny
**Scope boundary:** IN — role-based routing, escalation status, worker clearing. OUT — new role levels beyond current 5, cross-machine routing
**Completion criteria:** `cc_queue.py set-worker "" T-xxx` clears worker; Granny dispatches by role tier; DickSimnel failure sets status=escalated and bumps role; master CC picks up creator-level escalations; no dispatched_cycle.json
